details.test: Task 1: Apply for cheapest full-day nursery within 3km
Task 2: Save earliest-opening highly rated nursery to favorites
Task 3: Book morning visit at nearby playground nursery
Task 4: Register 4–5yo for two July afternoon activities at same center
Task 5: Compare half-day vs full-day fee plans and save cheaper
Task 6: Create ranked application with three full-day nurseries
Task 8: Start application from first open calendar day
